texts.orig: (I) Cancellation charges between 45 - 60 days is 20%, 30-45 days is 40%, 15-30 days is 60% And 5-15 days is 80% (ii) Cancellation within 1-5days (or No Show) of noon on date of accommodation 100% of the net value of the booking.
texts.text: (I) Cancellation charges between 45 - 60 days is 20%, 30-45 days is 40%, 15-30 days is 60% And 5-15 days is 80% (ii) Cancellation within 1-5days (or No Show) of noon on date of accommodation 100% of the net value of the booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 15. All rates are in nominated foreign and will be billed in that currency weekly, monthly, or at the end of the client's stay. Payments must be made within 30days of invoicing and the Agent must honour this Credit availability. Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Lake Nakuru Lodge accounts department within 14 days of invoicing and only the amount in dispute may be deducted from the invoice and payment due, which must be made within the specific time limit Default of undisputed payment may result in Agent's clients being refused admittance to the Hotel until payment is made.
